name: @everendforge/pathbranching
description: Visual branching narrative editor core for Everend Forge.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node scripts/run-vite.mjs build
scripts.verify:core: npm run build:core && node scripts/verify-core.mjs && node scripts/verify-narrative-integration.mjs && node scripts/verify-workspace-persistence.mjs && node scripts/verify-action-persistence.mjs && node scripts/verify-dialogue-nodes.mjs && node scripts/verify-event-script-sections.mjs && node scripts/verify-worldnotion-yaml-import.mjs && node scripts/verify-story-outline.mjs && node scripts/verify-canon-change-workflow.mjs && node scripts/verify-inspector-tabs.mjs && node scripts/verify-subcanvas-routing.mjs && node scripts/verify-twine-import-export.mjs && node scripts/verify-evpath-format.mjs && node scripts/verify-evpath-storage.mjs
scripts.verify:evpath: npm run build:core && node scripts/verify-evpath-format.mjs && node scripts/verify-evpath-storage.mjs
scripts.verify:persistence: npm run build:core && node scripts/verify-workspace-persistence.mjs && node scripts/verify-action-persistence.mjs
